parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Free-text search on company name or national ID.

parameters.name: employeeCountCategory
parameters.description: Return only companies whose employee-count bucket matches.

parameters.name: companyStatus
parameters.description: Return only companies whose report status is one of the provided values (same status shown on each company). Omit for no constraint.

parameters.name: expiresWithin
parameters.description: Return only companies that have an approved report expiring within the given window. Multiple values are OR-ed; the largest window wins.

parameters.name: finesStarted
parameters.description: When true, return only companies in the daily-fines process (finesStarted = true).

parameters.name: quarantined
parameters.description: When true, return only quarantined companies (quarantined = true).

parameters.name: overdue
parameters.description: When true, return only companies whose next equality or salary report due date has passed.

parameters.name: isatCategoryCode
parameters.description: Return only companies whose admin-owned ÍSAT2008 category is one of the given leaf codes (e.g. "01110").

parameters.name: regionCode
parameters.description: Return only companies located in one of the given regions (landshluti), by region code (e.g. "CAPITAL"). Resolved via the company postcode.

parameters.name: postcode
parameters.description: Return only companies with one of the given postcodes (póstnúmer, e.g. "101").

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Free-text search on ÍSAT code or description (Icelandic/English). Returns the top matches.

parameters.name: codes
parameters.description: Resolve these exact ÍSAT leaf codes — used to label an existing selection. Takes precedence over `q`.

parameters.name: showInactive
parameters.description: When true, includes inactive users. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: regionCode
parameters.description: Return only postcodes belonging to one of the given region codes (e.g. "CAPITAL"). Omit for all postcodes.

parameters.name: unassignedReviewer
parameters.description: When true, returns only reports with no reviewer assigned. Overrides `reviewerUserId` if both are set.

parameters.name: hasImprovementPlan
parameters.description: When true, returns only reports that have at least one employee outlier (i.e. an improvement plan applies). When false, returns only reports with no outliers. Omit for no constraint.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Free-text search across company name, kennitala, and report identifier. Case-insensitive partial match. Person fields (contacts and company admin/CEO) are not searched.

get.description: Paginated list of a report's employee outliers — the rows behind the Úrbótaáætlun table. Split out from the report-detail payload because a single salary report can carry hundreds of rows. Defaults to `employeeOrdinal` ascending; override with `sortBy` + `direction`.

parameters.name: groupId
parameters.description: Restrict the list to the outliers belonging to a single group.

get.description: A report's outlier groups (id, name, and the shared reason/action/signature explanation). A report with detected outliers always has at least one group; multiple groups drive the per-group Úrbótaáætlun tables.
Adjusted base salary (baseSalary / workRatio) by gender and total score (all criteria). Returns scatter data points, a linear regression line, score-bucket averages with wage gap, and overall totals.

Adjusted base salary (baseSalary / workRatio) by gender and work score (mandatory criteria only, excludes PERSONAL). Returns scatter data points, a linear regression line, score-bucket averages with wage gap, and overall totals.

Adjusted full salary ((baseSalary + additionalSalary + bonusSalary) / workRatio) by gender and total score (all criteria). Returns scatter data points, a linear regression line, score-bucket averages with wage gap, and overall totals.
Gender wage gap for adjusted base salary (baseSalary / workRatio). Returns average and median salaries per gender with both average-based and median-based wage gap percentages.

Gender wage gap for adjusted full salary ((baseSalary + additionalSalary + bonusSalary) / workRatio). Returns average and median salaries per gender with both average-based and median-based wage gap percentages.
Average bonus salary (aukagreiðslur) and additional salary (viðbótarlaun) by gender. Raw values, not adjusted for work ratio. Returns per-gender breakdown with wage gap for each component and total.

200.description: Generates and returns the report as a PDF. The layout ("Jafnlaunaúttekt" or "Jafnréttisáætlun") is chosen from the report type.

info.title: Directorate of Equality — Internal API
info.description: Internal API for direct communication between the DoE web application (doe-web) and the DoE API. Covers report management, workflow transitions (assign, deny, approve), company administration (status, ÍSAT, daily-fines flag), comments, statistics, and user administration. Not intended for external consumers.

translatedMessage.description: User-facing, localized message safe to display directly in the client. Absent when the error has no curated translation.

key.description: S3 object key returned by the presign endpoint.

parsed.description: Parsed workbook payload from an excel import endpoint.

name.description: Applicant-supplied label for the group. Not required to be unique. When omitted (the implicit single-group case) the server assigns a default name.

employeeOrdinals.description: Ordinals of the employees in `parsed.employees[]` this group covers.

parsed.description: Parsed workbook payload from the excel import endpoint. Contains the criteria tree, role list, and employee rows.

reportId.description: Identifier of the newly created report row.

email.description: Contact email for the company. Used by the deadline-reminder task.

finesStarted.description: Daily-fines flag. `true` means the company is in the daily-fines process, handled outside this system.

quarantined.description: Admin halt switch. `true` means all outbound activity (scheduled jobs, emails, notifications) for the company is suspended.

isatCategoryCode.description: Normalized ÍSAT2008 leaf code (admin-owned statistics field), e.g. "01110".

equalityReportOverdue.description: Derived: the company's next equality-report due date has passed.

salaryReportOverdue.description: Derived: the company's next salary-report due date has passed.

reason.description: Optional reason for the change, e.g. bankruptcy or merger.

isatCategoryCode.description: Normalized ÍSAT2008 leaf code, e.g. "01110". Null clears the classification.

finesStarted.description: Whether the company is in the daily-fines process (handled outside this system). `true` starts it, `false` stops it.

reason.description: Optional reason for starting/stopping the fines process, kept on the company timeline for later audit.

email.description: Contact email for the company. Null (or empty) clears it. Read by the report-deadline-reminder task.

quarantined.description: Whether the company is quarantined (all outbound activity halted). `true` quarantines it, `false` lifts it.

reason.description: Optional reason for quarantining/lifting, kept on the company timeline for later audit.

authorName.description: Full name of the admin who authored the comment.

note.description: Soft notice, e.g. an unresolved postcode that was left unset.

year.description: Reporting year (TEKJUAR) from the file, if consistent.

noticeCount.description: Notice from a soft issue, e.g. an unresolved postcode.

url.description: Presigned S3 PUT URL the client uploads the .xlsx to. Expires in 1h.

key.description: Object key the upload lands at. Pass this back to the import endpoint.

nationalId.description: National ID. Accepts XXXXXXXXXX, XXXXXX-XXXX, or XXXXXX XXXX — always normalised to XXXXXXXXXX.

code.description: Stable machine key for the region, e.g. CAPITAL

companyFinesStarted.description: Daily-fines flag. `true` means the company is currently in the daily-fines process.

companyQuarantined.description: Quarantine flag. `true` means the company is currently quarantined.

waitingForAction.description: True when the most recent activity on this report is a comment authored by the company (application side). Resets to false whenever a reviewer action/event or reviewer comment supersedes it.

includesImprovementPlan.description: True when the report has at least one employee outlier — outliers are the input that drives the company-side improvement plan.

authorName.description: Full name of the authoring reviewer. Null for company-authored comments (no individual person).

outliersPostponed.description: Salary-only. Null on equality reports. When true, the company has acknowledged every outlier on this salary report but deferred the explanations — all outlier rows are persisted with NULL explanation columns.

companyFinesStarted.description: Daily-fines flag. `true` means the company is currently in the daily-fines process.

companyQuarantined.description: Quarantine flag. `true` means the company is currently quarantined.

includesImprovementPlan.description: True when the report has at least one employee outlier. The full list is fetched separately via `GET /reports/:id/outliers`.

employeeOrdinal.description: 1-indexed ordinal of the outlier employee in the report's parsed employee list. Mirrors `report_employee.ordinal` — used to cross-reference the canonical detected set on `report_result.outlier_analysis_snapshot.employees`.

groupId.description: Id of the outlier group this outlier belongs to. Every outlier always belongs to exactly one group.

groupName.description: Name of the outlier group this outlier belongs to. Denormalized from the group for convenient client-side grouping/labeling.

reason.description: Explanation shared by the group. Denormalized from the outlier group — every outlier in the same group carries the same value. Null only while the parent report has `status = POSTPONED`.

adjustedBaseSalary.description: Employee's full-time-equivalent base salary at submission, projected from the matching `outlier_analysis_snapshot.employees` entry. Null if the snapshot has no matching ordinal.

predictedBaseSalary.description: Salary predicted by the regression line at the employee's exact score. Null when the regression had no slope (insufficient sample) or no matching snapshot entry exists.

direction.description: Sign of the deviation from the predicted salary: 'ABOVE' | 'BELOW' | 'EQUAL'. Null when no prediction was available.

differencePercent.description: Signed percent deviation of the employee's adjusted base salary from the predicted salary.

allowedDifferencePercent.description: Half-threshold band (in percent) used to flag this row as an outlier — i.e. the report-wide allowed deviation at submission time.

name.description: Applicant-supplied label for the group. Non-empty. The implicit single group created when no grouping is provided uses a default name.

reason.description: Null only while the parent report is postponed (explanation not yet filled). Otherwise non-empty.

userId.description: Target reviewer user id. Omit to assign to the caller, pass a UUID to assign to a specific active user, or pass null to unassign (returns the report to the SUBMITTED queue).
